mapper.select: select id, name, type, afoot_roll_back, end_roll_back, pos from sales_order_stage_config where organization_id = #{orgId} order by pos asc
mapper.update:
UPDATE sales_order_stage_config
afoot_roll_back =#{request.afootRollBack},
end_roll_back = #{request.endRollBack},
WHERE organization_id = #{orgId}
update sales_order_stage_config set name = #{request.name}, update_user = #{userId}, update_time = unix_timestamp() * 1000 where id = #{request.id}
update sales_order_stage_config set pos = #{pos} where id = #{id}
